query:
-- BARU Bistrô: endereço correto é Av. Brigadeiro Faria Lima, complemento Shopping Iguatemi
UPDATE establishments 
SET address = 'Avenida Brigadeiro Faria Lima', 
    complement = 'Shopping Iguatemi',
    addressNumber = '2232'
WHERE id = 1921;

-- HASHI Tea: extrair complemento
UPDATE establishments 
SET address = 'Rua dos Aflitos',
    complement = 'Galeria Pingo Doce, loja F-02'
WHERE id = 4352;
